question:
[Previous Feedback] Python script has correct naming and module-level docstring Meta section.

Please create a Q2 key milestone schedule, in JSON format, saved to the day15/ directory. Include the main milestones for each month in Q2, with each entry containing milestone_name, target_date (ISO 8601), and owner.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 10:40 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Python script has correct naming and module-level docstring Meta section.

Please create a Q2 key milestone schedule, in JSON format, saved to the day15/ directory. Include the main milestones for each month in Q2, with each entry containing milestone_name, target_date (ISO 8601), and owner.

Created **`day15/20260403_q2_key_milestone_schedule.json`** (P2 naming, P3 top-level `meta` with ISO 8601 `created_at`).

It includes Q2 monthly milestones (April/May/June), each with:
- `milestone_name`
- `target_date` (ISO 8601)
- `owner`
